zh.lifeSummary: 當Rafe de Woley於大約1309年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親William de Woley26歲，母親Sebilla De Woley34歲。他於大約1350年與Mrs. Rafe de Woley在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.Broadbotham, Mottram, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾莫特拉姆
zh-hans.Bridgewater, Somersetshire, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特布利其沃特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rafe de Woley于大约1309年出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲William de Woley26岁，母亲Sebilla De Woley34岁。他于大约1350年与Mrs. Rafe de Woley在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Woley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jozef, Boleslaw, Halina, Janusz, Krzysztof, Lech, Stanislaw.
Polish: from a pet form of a personal name such as Wolimir (see Wolak ).
Polish (Wołek): nickname from wołek ‘little bullock’, or possibly a metonymic occupational name for someone who looked after bullocks.

variants.name: Wolak
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Ludwik, Andrzej, Casimir, Genowefa, Janusz, Jaroslaw, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Piotr, Teofil.
Polish: patronymic from a short form of a personal name, such as Wolimir, based on the Slavic element vol ‘to want’ (from Old Slavic voliti, Polish woleć).

nameMeanings.name: Rafe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spelling representation of the traditional pronunciation of the name   Ralph  , a pronunciation now largely restricted to the upper classes in England.

en.lifeSummary: When Rafe de Woley was born about 1309, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Woley, was 26 and his mother, Sebilla De Woley, was 34. He married Mrs. Rafe de Woley about 1350, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1369, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rafe de Woley est né environ 1309, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Woley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sebilla De Woley, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Rafe de Woley environ 1350, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rafe de Woley um 1309 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Woley 26 und seine Mutter Sebilla De Woley 34. Er hat um 1350 in Cheshire, England Mrs. Rafe de Woley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1369 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rafe de Woley è nato il circa 1309 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Woley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Sebilla De Woley, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Rafe de Woley circa 1350, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rafe de Woleyが約1309年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Woleyは26歳，母Sebilla De Woleyは34歳であった。約1350年にイギリスチェシュアイアでMrs. Rafe de Woleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rafe de Woley(이)가 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Woley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sebilla De Woley(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 체실르에서 Mrs. Rafe de Woley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rafe de Woley nasceu aproximadamente 1309, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Woley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sebilla De Woley, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Rafe de Woley aproximadamente 1350, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rafe de Woley родился около 1309 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Woley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sebilla De Woley, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Rafe de Woley около 1350 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1369 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rafe de Woley nació aproximadamente 1309, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Woley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Sebilla De Woley, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Mrs. Rafe de Woley aproximadamente 1350, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
